title: SimpleScoreboard
description: A Simple Scoreboard plugin for minecraft
body:
**[вҡ пёҸ]NOTE!** If u have aby issue with the plugin please report to in our discord!

**ConfigurableScoreboard Plugin рҹҺ®**

Fully customizable scoreboard plugin for Minecraft 1.21+ with real-time statistics and performance monitoring.

**вңЁ Features**

 **Player Statistics**
- вқӨпёҸ Health & Hunger tracking
- вңЁ Experience level & progress
- рҹ“Қ Real-time coordinates
- рҹҢҚ World information
- рҹҢҗ Player ping display

 **Server Monitoring**
- вҡҷпёҸ **Smart TPS Display** - Automatic color coding:
  - рҹҹў Green (вүҘ19.0) - Excellent
  - рҹҹЎ Yellow (вүҘ17.0) - Good
  - рҹҹ  Orange (вүҘ15.0) - Moderate
  - рҹ”ҙ Red (<15.0) - Poor
- рҹ‘Ҙ Online player count
- рҹ•җ Real-time clock & date

 **Customization**
- рҹҺЁ Full color code support (`&a`, `&c`, etc.)
- рҹ“қ 20+ dynamic placeholders
- вҡЎ Configurable update interval
- рҹҺҜ Multiple pre-made designs included
- рҹ’« Unicode & emoji support

 **Technical**
- Low resource usage with optimized tick scheduling
- Per-player scoreboard toggle
- Auto-enable for new players
- Vault integration for economy (optional)
- Async TPS calculation

 **рҹ“Ӣ Placeholders**
****
| Placeholder | Description |
|-------------|-------------|
| `{player}` | Player name |
| `{hp}` / `{max_hp}` | Health points |
| `{food}` | Hunger level |
| `{level}` / `{exp}` | XP level and progress |
| `{ping}` | Player ping (ms) |
| `{tps}` | Server TPS |
| `{tps_color}` | Auto TPS color |
| `{online}` / `{max_online}` | Player count |
| `{world}` | World name |
| `{x}` `{y}` `{z}` | Coordinates |
| `{time}` / `{date}` | Current time/date |
| `{money}` | Balance (Vault) |
| `{rank}` | Player rank |

 **рҹҺ® Commands**

- `/sb` - Show help
- `/sb toggle` - Enable/disable scoreboard
- `/sb reload` - Reload config (requires `scoreboard.reload`)

 **рҹҺЁ Color Codes**

Use `&` for colors and formatting:
- `&0-9, a-f` - Colors
- `&l` - Bold
- `&m` - Strikethrough
- `&n` - Underline
- `&o` - Italic
- `&r` - Reset

 **рҹ’Ў Quick Tips**

**Performance**: Set `update-interval: 40` (2 seconds) for large servers

**Design**: Use empty lines `""` for spacing, combine codes like `&b&lBold Aqua`

**Creative**: Use `&m` with spaces for lines: `&7&m----`, or Unicode boxes: `в”Ңв”Җв”җв”Ӯв””в”ҳ`

**TPS Colors**: Use `{tps_color}{tps}` for automatic performance indication

 **рҹ”§ Configuration**

Simple YAML setup in `config.yml`:
- Customize title, lines, and colors
- Adjust update frequency
- Enable/disable auto-start
- Create unlimited custom designs

 **рҹ”Ң Integration**s

- **Vault** - Display player economy balance
- **Permission Plugins** - Show player ranks (LuckPerms, PermissionsEx, etc.)

 **рҹ“Ҡ Technical Highlights**

- Rolling average TPS calculation over 20 ticks
- HashMap-based player tracking with auto cleanup
- Bukkit Scoreboard API with custom wrappers
- Thread-safe async operations
- Supports Paper & Spigot

 **рҹҶҳ Troubleshooting**

**Not showing?** - Check `/sb toggle` or `auto-enable: true` in config

**No colors?** - Use `&` not `В§`, check YAML formatting (spaces, not tabs)

**Placeholders broken?** - Verify spelling, reload with `/sb reload`

---

**Version:** 2.0 | **MC:** 1.21+ | **Java:** 21+
